title: Sitara Kitchen Roll Holder, Self-Adhesive or Perforated Paper Towel Holder for Bathroom and Kitchen Accessories, Under Cupboard Kitchen Roll Holder, 304 Stainless Steel (Silver)
features: 【 PRIME QUALITY 】- Our kitchen holder is made of superior quality SUS304 Stainless Steel, super strong and durable. Ensuring high quality, durability and longevity as it is anti-rust, anti-corrosion and waterproof. Its smooth surface will not damage the paper.

【 PERFECT DESIGN 】- Modern and simple look, open-arm design kitchen roll holder under cabinet can be installed vertically or horizontally using the space under or on the surface of the cabinets, freeing up countertop space and keeping the kitchen well-organised.

【 WIDE APPLICATION 】- A modern and stylish addition to home furnishing and a great space saver, perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, Caravans, Mobile homes and other places etc. Under cabinet kitchen roll holder has wide usage. Can be used to place paper towels but also kitchenware, plastic wrap, hand towels, etc.

【 EASY TO INSTALL 】- Our wall mounted and self adhesive kitchen roll holder has multiple easy installation methods. Adhesive paper towel holder is easy to install, first clean the wall, keep the surface dry to ensure no dust on the surface then peel off film of adhesive pad and stick it on the wall, press it for 2-3 minutes and leave for 24 hours. Also comes with strong nails for drilling or hammering.

【 EASY TO REMOVE 】- Along with easy application it is also easy to remove, you just need to heat the adhesive part with a hair dryer, and then scrape it gently with a blade. If you use the screws drill method, you need to unscrew the screws, which may affect the appearance of the wall.
description: Product Description Sitara’s promise of high quality! Here is to you shining bright like Sitara! OUR VALUES Sustainability Quality Customer First Team Work SITARA KITCHEN ROLL HOLDER Our best 304 Stainless Steel make Sitara is proud to present our premium stainless steel kitchen roll holder that can be screwed in or glued to any flat surface both horizontally or vertically giving you ample range of motion. This versatile product can be used in kitchens, bathrooms, workspaces, garages, and other useful points in one's livelihood. As with everything else, our aim is to enable easy living for our valued customers! Here is to you shining bright like Sitara! Material: SUS - 304 stainless steel, Smooth surface: Brushed surface, smooth without burrs, superior smooth texture. Installation method: Self-adhesive and Drilling – flexible installation. Package: Paper towel holder x 1 2 x nails, 2 x rawl plug 2 x round, 2 x nails caps 1 x adhesive sticker Self Adhesive Method: Easily mounted using a strong adhesive sticker, provided with the product. Being Self-adhesive it is very easy to paste under the cabinet or on kitchen walls. Let it settle for 24 hours before using. Strong adhesive Drilling Method: Mark 2 holes using product holes as a reference, drill at the marked areas, hammer in rawl plugs, place the holder, screw in nails – and voila! The holder is installed! Finish the look with screw caps to cover the nails (included with the product). Note: Use your own discretion when choosing between Adhesive and drill options – as always, the drill option is usually better for stronger load-bearing.
